level_signals: 8+ years of product management experience or equivalent
Multi-year vision setting and OKR ownership
Leading platform and firmware strategy across two teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management experience or equivalent
Demonstrated success and strong execution track record in building and sustaining scalable technology products

Great interpersonal skills and strong verbal and written communication. You can collaborate and thrive in productive, healthy debate done with mutual respect and shared goals. You can make complex concepts accessible with clear communication.
Proven track record of successful stakeholder management including executive communications, handling escalations, and advocating for ongoing investment in your product.
Experience working on products with developer interfaces, including app deployment, APIs, and SDKs
Technically adept systems thinker, ideally with a Computer Science or equivalent degree or experience working as a software engineer
Open to travel to Asia, including traveling at times to our Hong Kong or Taiwan locations.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience successfully building and launching 0–1 products

scope.surface: Stripe Terminal device software platform — OS platform, firmware, and third-party hardware partnerships for in-person commerce devices
scope.business_model: B2B payments infrastructure; in-person payments hardware and software platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Terminal user experience quality (device boot, updates, security, performance)
OKR attainment against multi-year roadmap milestones
core_responsibilities: Set a motivating multi-year vision for device software in partnership with the Hardware team
Break vision into measurable milestones for the Terminal OS Platform Team and Firmware team
Partner with software and hardware engineers to understand device technology
Research and document what Terminal customers need for excellent in-person payments experience
Research competitive landscape and translate into differentiating features
Collaborate with Partnerships team to develop roadmap for third-party hardware partnerships
Use metrics and analytics to inform prioritization and measure success
Define product requirements and support development sequencing decisions
Leverage technical knowledge to support technical trade-off decisions

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (Terminal OS Platform + Firmware teams)
Encourages applications from candidates who meet minimum requirements even without preferred qualifications
Well-defined responsibility scope with concrete technical domains listed
Stripe's scale and mission offer significant career impact
red_flags: Location not specified in JD — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not addressed
Travel to Asia (Hong Kong/Taiwan) required — may be a constraint for some candidates
Role requires deep cross-functional ownership across both hardware and software organizations, which is a broad and demanding scope

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 8+ years requirement and scope of responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from Stripe Terminal product description)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)

ambiguities: The JD does not specify a location or work arrangement (remote, hybrid, onsite). Cities and location type cannot be determined from the JD content.

'Technically adept systems thinker, ideally with a Computer Science or equivalent degree' uses 'ideally' suggesting a preference, but it appears in the Minimum Requirements section — classified as hard with a note that equivalent experience is accepted.
The AOSP technology is mentioned only in the responsibilities section (not requirements), but Android OS internals appears in preferred qualifications — both captured appropriately.
